title: landolphia calabarica
intro: Landolphia calabarica, also known as Calabar berry or Calabar prune, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Landolphia calabarica include its potential to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
